title: Piquant Turkish Cauliflower Flatbread
description: A sour, flaky midnight-craving flatbread with sweet chili sauce and pickles, perfect for a keto-friendly snack.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200 degrees Celsius (400 degrees Fahrenheit) and line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Steam the cauliflower florets until just tender, about 5-7 minutes, then let them cool slightly.
In a bowl, mash the cauliflower with olive oil, egg, feta, oregano, salt, and pepper until smooth.
Transfer the dough to the prepared sheet and roll it into a flat, 10 cm thick circle using your hands.
Bake for 15 minutes until the edges are golden and the center firm.
Brush the crust with melted butter and bake for an additional 5 minutes until flaky.
Let the flatbread cool for 2 minutes before slicing.
Spread sweet chili sauce over the top of each slice.
Top each slice with pickle pieces and a sprinkle of parsley.
Serve warm as a midnight snack.
